rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

The filing deadline was 01/24/2022. 2) Neither a petition for final distribution nor a petition for approval of a report of status of administration has been filed yet. The filing deadline was 09/22/2022. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID ZHANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the title of the pleading shown on the face of the Notice of Hearing should not have included the filing date, the administrator was appointed on 9/1/20 (the order was not filed until 9/2/20), and the date the creditors' claims period expired was 1/1/21, not 2/8/21. Status of closing the estate is now set for 5/2/2023. A petition for final distribution or a further report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed at least two weeks before 5/2/2023. Appearance will be required on 5/2/2023 if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGE STANLEY CORNS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/8/22. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The 13100 affidavits were filed without this examiner having reviewed them to confirm that original certified copies of death certificates were attached. The administrator has also not addressed under what authority she retained estate assets in a foreign jurisdiction. [Probate Code Section 9700.] (The proof of service filed on 8/22/22 is identical to the one filed on 5/10/22 but for the mailing date filled in at item 4a. The more recent proof of service, therefore, could NOT have been verified on 5/9/22. A declaration prepared on JC form MC-030 is NOT a proper proof of service or remedy for a defective proof of service; however, in the interest of limiting the outstanding issues so that the estate can close, no new corrected proof of service will be required at this time. Counsel should make a note for future reference.) A courtesy copy of the supplement to the petition, addressing the investment of estate assets outside of California, must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/31/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF NADINE WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing; however, the date of the order authorizing fees to the Court-appointed attorney was not set forth in the supplement. The date of an order authorizing fees to an attorney must be set forth in the detailed descriptions on the disbursements schedule. (Whether or not the Judicial Council forms are used by a standard account filer, a subsequent account must include a schedule of assets on hand at the end of the prior account, and the account must also state the date of any order authorizing payment of fiduciary or attorney fees. [CRC 7.575(e)(6)(C).] See Judicial Council forms GC-400(PH)(1) and GC-400(C)(4).)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CLEON LINTZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The petitioner is one of the five surviving children of the decedent. Gisele Lintz, Celeste Lintz, Lorna Hayes, and Trina Lintz, the decedent's other four children, have not waived their equal priority for appointment. 2) The petitioner requests full IAEA authority with her bond to be fixed at $20,000. The estimated value of the estate solely consisting of real property is $300,000. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD BLAIR FLORENCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner alleges that the one-page document attached to Decedent's will contains additional wishes of Decedent but acknowledges that it is not a part of the statutory will and should not be admitted as part of the will. No legal discussion has been provided to show whether or not it is a valid testamentary instrument. 2) Summons was issued to Renee Stewart, and she has answered, but no proof of service of summons has been filed. 3) Summons has not been issued to anyone else needed under Probate Code 8110 and 8250. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD BLAIR FLORENCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner requests $329,000 in bond, even though total property is valued at $549,000 and full authority under IAEA is requested. Petitioner cites CRC 7.207, which applies to guardianship and conservatorships only. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Rulings: Matter continued to 11/21/2022. Proof of service of notice of hearing to the predeceased spouse's heirs are required. Proof of service must be filed 7 days prior to the hearing. The court noted there has been an opposition to petition filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KEITH GABRIEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/6/22. Notice to a minor must be given directly to the minor and also to the person having legal custody of the minor with whom the minor resides. [CRC 7.51(d).] Is the minor a beneficiary of the trust? He is not an heir if his father survived. Are David Gabriel and Miriam Gabriel deceased? Their dates of death were not set forth. [LRSF 14.18 C.] It appears from the family chart that the decedent and David Gabriel and Miriam Gabriel were second cousins as Decedent's father and David and Miriam's father were cousins. The issue of the latter two would then be second cousins once removed. Still no courtesy copy of the petition or proof of publication has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] Courtesy copies, including of any papers filed to address these issues, must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/28/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
